title: English Language Teacher
description:
Job Summary

·      Our client is an established international literacy centre with more than 20 years of experience in the education field.

·      2 openings, location in West and North, Singapore

·      Monthly salary $3500-$4000 plus Variable Bonus

·      Benefits include annual leave, paid public holidays, medical and dental allowances, hospitalisation insurance, career development and progression opportunities.

Responsibilities

·      Teaching pre-reading, reading and comprehension skills to toddlers and children below 12 years old

·      Lesson preparation and marking, including the preparation of appropriate teaching resources and participating in teacher and curriculum meetings on a weekly basis.

·      Maintaining regular open communication with parents, through informal, formal and scheduled parent-teacher meetings providing regular updates to parents on students’ performance and progression.

·      Helping children develop social skills and positive classroom behaviour

·      Creating a conducive learning environment for students, safeguarding their wellbeing at all times.

·      Participate in open house events

Requirements

·      Diploma/ Degree-level qualifications, preferably in Teaching/Education/Early Childhood/ Studies/English/English Literature or Linguistics

·      Strong command of the English Language

·      Minimally two years of related teaching experience

·      Possess strong communication and interpersonal skills and the ability to operate with a high level of integrity and professionalism

·      Willing to teach on weekends and weekday evenings



We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and/or resume, you are deemed to consent to Recruit Fast Pte Ltd or its agents to collect, use and disclose your personal data and/or resume for the purpose of processing and administrating this job application.

Linda Lim
Recruit Fast Pte.Ltd. (EA License: 23C1828)
EA Personnel: R1221302
Website: www.recruitfast.sg

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Fast, an employment agency based in Singapore that prioritizes the best interests of our clients, candidates, and colleagues. Our team has years of experience in recruitment and specializes in connecting employers with skilled professionals across various industries.

Doing Business The Best Way!

Our Vision

To be the leading and preferred recruitment partner that clients, candidates and partners always choose to connect with.

Our Mission

Economically empowering everyone in the Staffing and Recruitment industry. For the humans, by the humans.

Core Values

  • Collaboration - We work as one, together with our partners, to achieve and build a strong and long-term relationship based on tolerance, respect, trust and mutual cooperation.
  • Caring - We value each human, being compassionate and always working for the benefit of the people we serve.
  • Integrity - We earn and uphold the trust and confidence of our Partners, Clients and Candidates.
  • Innovation - We constantly pursue new ideas and creative solutions to improve our services.
  • Professionalism - We take pride in what we do and strive for excellence in our daily work.
